description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to all branches except master. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: linux-compat, al2, clang-compat, gcc-compat, windows, and osx. Each job runs on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, or macos-latest) and uses Docker images from GitHub Packages to build the aws-iot-device-sdk-cpp-v2 package with various configurations and compilers.
